expectations.text: Recognizes auditEvent as a transactional / continuously-growing table
expectations.evidence: 'auditEvent is the textbook transactional table: append-only, timestamped, written by every service, unbounded growth'

expectations.text: Flags the missing time/date window (no bound on createdAt) and recommends one on an indexed column
expectations.evidence: Finding 2: no time window; add from/to default 7 days + index (type, createdAt DESC)

expectations.text: Flags the absence of a take/limit (unbounded result set) and recommends pagination (cursor/keyset or take)
expectations.evidence: Finding 1: no take returns every row; keyset cursor + capped take

expectations.text: Flags over-fetching via include (user + metadata) and recommends selecting only needed fields
expectations.evidence: Finding 4: include pulls full user+metadata; use select, move metadata to detail endpoint

expectations.text: States a tradeoff for at least one recommendation (not just the fix)
expectations.evidence: Tradeoffs on keyset (no page jumps), default window (behavior change), composite index (write cost)
